meta.defaultDescription: Nexatlas crafts premium private and small-group journeys across Uzbekistan and the Silk Road — cultural tours, family trips, luxury and business travel, designed by local experts.

hero.eyebrow: Uzbekistan · The Heart of the Silk Road
hero.title: Discover Uzbekistan Beyond Expectations
hero.subtitle: Tailor-made cultural journeys, Silk Road adventures and luxury private tours — crafted by local experts who know every turquoise dome and hidden caravanserai.

trust.title: Trusted by travelers from around the world

destinations.title: Iconic Silk Road Destinations
destinations.subtitle: From the turquoise mosques of Samarkand to the living museum of Khiva — explore the cities that shaped human history.

tours.title: Signature Uzbekistan Tours
tours.subtitle: Hand-crafted itineraries for every traveler — cultural explorers, families, luxury seekers and business guests.

experiences.title: Experiences for Every Traveler
experiences.subtitle: Whether you seek deep culture, family memories, refined luxury or seamless business travel, we design around you.

why.title: Your trusted Uzbekistan destination expert
why.subtitle: We are an Uzbekistan-based team turning first-time visitors into lifelong friends of the Silk Road.
why.point1Body: Born and based in Uzbekistan, our specialists craft journeys from firsthand knowledge — not a catalog.
why.point2Body: Every itinerary is built around your pace, interests and budget, from mid-range comfort to true luxury.
why.point3Body: Licensed, insured and reachable around the clock, with vetted guides, drivers and hand-picked hotels.
why.point4Body: One dedicated travel designer from your first message to your journey home.

testimonials.title: What our guests say
testimonials.subtitle: Real words from travelers who discovered Uzbekistan with Nexatlas.

journal.title: Stories & practical guides
journal.subtitle: Insider knowledge to plan an unforgettable Uzbekistan journey.

inquiry.title: Plan Your Trip
inquiry.subtitle: Tell us your travel dreams and a dedicated Nexatlas designer will craft a personalized proposal — free, no obligation.
inquiry.name: Full name
inquiry.message: Tell us about your dream trip
inquiry.successBody: Your inquiry has been received. A Nexatlas travel designer will be in touch within 24 hours.

footer.about: Nexatlas is a licensed Uzbekistan-based tour operator specializing in premium inbound travel across the Silk Road.
footer.newsletterTitle: Silk Road inspiration in your inbox
footer.newsletterBody: Travel ideas, seasonal tips and exclusive journeys.
